face.structure: oval shape with a slightly pointed chin, high cheekbones, and a smooth forehead, conveying both intelligence and maturity

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with slightly upturned outer corners
eyes.color: deep onyx black with subtle blue undertones
details: thin, dark eyebrows with a subtle arch adding to her analytical nature
delicate long lashes that emphasize the eye shape
eyes.expression_effect: give a penetrating, methodical gaze, hinting at a constant assessment of surroundings

face.expression: slight, enigmatic smile that suggests confidence and a hint of mystery

skin.rendering_notes: soft, seamless transitions with subtle highlights on the cheekbones

hair.style: long and straight with subtle layers framing the face
hair.flow: naturally sleek, flowing past the shoulders with a slight inward curve at the ends
details: a thin fringe that lightly grazes the eyebrows
occasional strands reflecting a darker shade in shadow

character.aura: commanding yet approachable presence, exuding confidence and competence

details: silver stitching on the cuffs and lapels
two sets of brass buttons that add a touch of authority
outfit.fit: fitted silhouette, structured shoulders, accentuating a professional demeanor

composition.framing: medium shot, centered with emphasis on the upper body
composition.pose: standing with arms slightly crossed at the waist
composition.gesture: left hand lightly grasping the opposite elbow, adding to a calculative and poised appearance

background.color_palette: neutral tones with hints of warm wood and cool metal
background.details: modern minimalist decor with a view of city skyscrapers through a large window
background.rules: maintain a professional and non-distracting setting that complements Jang Sun-Mi's tactical expertise
